title: Where to buy Darrell Lea Nougat Egg
content_raw:
```html

Where to buy Darrell Lea Nougat Egg

You can buy our most famous Nougat Egg online. Also, you can come to our shops Darrel Lea/Kards & Kandy at Westfield Kotara, Charlestown Square, and Stockland Greenhills. For some Thai food lovers, we partner with The Humble Thai in Newcastle and The Grateful Thai in Charlestown when you order food delivery from them, you can add Darrell Lea Nougat Egg in the order as well! It will be a lot easier for you in the current situation!

If you're looking for Easter candy in Australia, the Darrell Lea Nougat Egg is one of our most iconic seasonal treats. Whether you're shopping for yourself or planning ahead for Easter gifts, we make it convenient with multiple purchasing options.

For those interested in creating the perfect Easter gift package, you might also want to explore our candy gift box options in Australia, which can be paired with Nougat Eggs for a complete Easter hamper.

Additionally, if you're organising Easter celebrations or parties and need larger quantities, we offer bulk lollies in Australia to suit your needs.

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I buy Darrell Lea Nougat Eggs online and have them delivered?

Yes, you can purchase Darrell Lea Nougat Eggs directly online through the Sweets World website. We offer convenient online ordering with delivery options available throughout Australia.

Which shopping centres have Darrell Lea stores in Newcastle?

You can find Darrell Lea/Kards & Kandy stores at three Newcastle locations: Westfield Kotara, Charlestown Square, and Stockland Greenhills, where you can purchase Nougat Eggs in person.

Can I add Darrell Lea Nougat Eggs to my food delivery order from The Humble Thai or The Grateful Thai?

Yes! When ordering food delivery from The Humble Thai in Newcastle or The Grateful Thai in Charlestown, you can add Darrell Lea Nougat Eggs to your order for convenient combined delivery.

What is special about the Darrell Lea Nougat Egg?

The Darrell Lea Nougat Egg is our most famous Easter treat, featuring delicious nougat filled chocolate that's perfect for the Easter season. It comes in a 150g size and is available in milk chocolate varieties.

What size is the Darrell Lea Nougat Egg?

The Darrell Lea Nougat Egg comes in a 150g size, making it a generous Easter treat that's perfect for gifting or enjoying yourself.

```
